translation_text: What makes a great state is its being (like) a low-lying, down- flowing (stream);
translation_text_raw: What makes a great state is its being (like) a low-lying, down- flowing (stream);

chinese_text: 天下之牝，牝常以靜勝牡，
translation_text: - it becomes the centre to which tend (all the small states) under heaven. (To illustrate from) the case of all females:
translation_text_raw: - it becomes the centre to which tend (all the small states) under heaven. (To illustrate from) the case of all females:

translation_text: - the female always overcomes the male by her stillness.
translation_text_raw: - the female always overcomes the male by her stillness.

translation_text: Stillness may be considered (a sort of) abasement.
translation_text_raw: Stillness may be considered (a sort of) abasement.

chinese_text: 小國以下大國，則取大國。
translation_text: Thus it is that a great state, by condescending to small states, gains them for itself;
translation_text_raw: Thus it is that a great state, by condescending to small states, gains them for itself;

translation_text: and that small states, by abasing themselves to a great state, win it over to them.
translation_text_raw: and that small states, by abasing themselves to a great state, win it over to them.

translation_text: In the one case the abasement leads to gaining adherents, in the other case to procuring favour.
translation_text_raw: In the one case the abasement leads to gaining adherents, in the other case to procuring favour.

translation_text: The great state only wishes to unite men together and nourish them;
translation_text_raw: The great state only wishes to unite men together and nourish them;

translation_text: a small state only wishes to be received by, and to serve, the other.
translation_text_raw: a small state only wishes to be received by, and to serve, the other.

translation_text: Each gets what it desires, but the great state must learn to abase itself.
translation_text_raw: Each gets what it desires, but the great state must learn to abase itself.
